reference_policy: reference[0] is not used as gold; it remains a difficulty signal only.

kanban_card: G15 - Gan Target Selection and Semantic Adjudication
g15_claim_scope: target-selection and semantic adjudication over fixed candidate support; no exact aggregation-constructor claim
fixed_controls: gan_2026_fixed_v1:validation split and G6 standard50 record IDs
gan2026_paper_reproduction primary scorer with repair/range/tolerance disabled
no verifier or prediction-repair behavior changes

decision.rationale: G15 reached 31/50 paper monthly versus best baseline builder_gap_gpt at 41/50. The G6 stop rule requires at least a two-record lift and no motivating-overlay regression; regressions: target_selection, seizure_free_vs_quantified, unknown_no_reference.
